title: U Team Core
description: Open-Source API and library for U-Team's mods.
body:
Open-Source API and library for U-Team's mods. [](https://discordapp.com/invite/QXbWS36) Join our discord server for updates.
Report bugs on [github issues](https://github.com/MC-U-Team/U-Team-Core/issues) please!
This mod is just a libary mod used by other u-team's mods.
May other mod authors depend on this.
This mod can be packed in every modpack you want.
[Sourcecode](https://github.com/MC-U-Team/U-Team-Core) is linked above and is available under Apache License 2.0.
Report Bugs on github.
